steps.title: Compare treaty status
steps.content: Ghana ratified the Outer Space Treaty. Morocco has only signed it and has not officially ratified it. The transition must show a difference between the two countries' treaty actions.

steps.title: Signal contrast
steps.content: B would specify the previous point, C would give an example of it, and D would signal similarity. The second sentence instead contrasts Morocco's status with Ghana's ratification. The answer is A.
